column2: # Retrieve the significant post-hoc comparisons from Analysis 1 (both visits)
# FAC1-3 vs FAC4 : p = 0.079 (ns but marginal)
p_main <- ggplot(df_viz, aes(x = FAC_group, y = cadence, fill = FAC_group)) +
title    = "Cadence as a function of FAC group",
subtitle = "Mixed ANOVA effect of FAC: F(2,16) = 4.99, p = 0.021, \u03B7\u00B2p = 0.38",
"Boxes show the distribution of cadence across all 5 sensors and all available visits.\n",
"Significance from Bonferroni post-hoc on estimated marginal means. N = 19 samples (1 excluded due to missing sensor data)."
